center.name: Frederick DuCane Godman
center.summary: Frederick DuCane Godman是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Red-banded fruiteater、玫瑰色圈伞鸟、Black-fronted tyrannulet等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-fronted tyrannulet (Phylloscartes nigrifrons) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Guyana, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Guianan tyrannulet (Zimmerius acer) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, French Guiana, Guyana, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-banded fruiteater (Pipreola whitelyi) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae, the cotingas. It is found in Brazil, Guyana, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ruddy tody-flycatcher (Poecilotriccus russatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is native to the oriental tepuis of Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The tepui vireo, or tepui greenlet, (Vireo sclateri) is a species of bird in the family Vireonidae, the vireos, greenlets, and shrike-babblers. It is found in Brazil, Guyana, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rose-collared piha (Lipaugus streptophorus) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae, the cotingas. It is found in Brazil, Guyana, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-crowned antshrike (Thamnophilus atrinucha) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in every Central American country except El Salvador and in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
